fail_reason: total_hits = 7 >= 1. Candidate fails on multiple independent channels: (a) safety-LoRA primitive thoroughly covered by SaLoRA / SLIM / LoRA-Safety-Alignment / Purifying Finetuning Data (ranks 2-5) and inverted by Colluding LoRA attack (rank 6); (b) cryptographic runtime verification primitive directly covered by Cryptographic Wall (rank 7); (c) runtime safety-enforcement gate covered by Customizable Runtime Enforcement (rank 8). The combinatorial novelty claim (cryptographic signing + safety LoRA + presence-check gate + immediate output failure) decomposes into components each separately present in prior art; the conjunction does not establish sufficient novelty. Cross-agent verification confirms primary judge: FAIL.
